Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

TCL 06, 31 [arithmetical][via cams/gkab]

Top
t.e. 1t.e. 1

ina a-mat d60 u an-tu₄ mim-ma ma-la DU₃uš ina ŠU-MIN-ia liš-lim

By the command of Anu and Antu, may whatever is copied by my hand go well.

r ii 3333

IGI 3-GAL₂-BI 20

reciprocal 3 — its inverse 20

r ii 3434

per-su reš-tu-u : 1 : a-mu-u₂ : 2 : a-mu-u₂ NU AL.TIL

First section : 1 : times : 2 : times : unfinished.

r ii 3535

⸢DUB⸣ ša₂ SUM.MU—d60 A ša₂ mina—qi₂-bit—d60 A mḫun-zu-u lu₂MAŠ.MAŠ d60 u dan-tu₄ UNUGki u

Tablet of Nidintu-Anu, son of Ina-qibit-Anu, son of Hunzu, incantation priest of Anu and Antu, Urukean.

r ii 3636

ŠU mina—qi₂-bit—d60 DUMU-A.NI-šu₂

Hand of Ina-qibit-Anu, his son.

1 The scribe has omitted part of the line , but it is not clear what the reciprocal pair was intended to be.

2 The scribe has omitted part of the line , but it is not clear what the reciprocal pair was intended to be.

Created by Eleanor Robson for the AHRC-funded GKAB Project, 2007 and released under the Creative Commons Attribution Share-Alike license 3.0. Please cite this page as http://oracc.org/cams/gkab/P254386
